query: INSERT INTO pipelineDeals (clientName, dealName, serviceType, facility, company, stage, estimatedMonthlyRevenue, estimatedAnnualRevenue, estimatedPallets, estimatedLoads, keyServices, notes, probability, proposalDate, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES ('Banville & Jones (Good Boy Vodka)', 'Warehousing & PLCB Distribution', 'Warehousing', 'PA-510', 'L&M', 'proposal_sent', 9456, 113472, 77, 0, 'Quick-turn storage ($12/pallet first 60 days, $17 beyond), handling $7 in/$7 out, PLCB delivery $1.50/case ($2.00 all-in with label), 104 cases/pallet, 16-18 SKUs including seasonal', '50,000 cases/year pass-through. ~4,000 cases/month, ~8,000 on hand (~77 pallets). Quick-turn model with 45-60 day dwell time. Largest case volume and revenue supplier via Banville. Distribution transitioned from Southern. 10-case minimum per PLCB delivery. Goal: 50K cases in PA this year. Shrink-wrapped product for quicker delivery. Sub-account tracking under Banville.', 70, '2026-03-09', NOW(), NOW());

Quick-turn model with 45-60 day dwell time. Largest case volume and revenue supplier via Banville. Distribution transitioned from Southern. 10-case minimum per PLCB delivery.
